R.description: Universal Resonance Constant. Ratio of lambda_min(L_8x8) / lambda_min(L_6x6). Unique to the star-cluster + 3-clause bridge topology.

L1_identity.description: Hodge 1-Laplacian Identity for Complete Graphs Kn. Establishes the dissipation floor for bridge-mediated flows.

cross_helicity_barrier.efficiency_decay: C_cross(N) decreases (0.4182 to 0.4069 across N=32 to N=64)

lamb_helicity_decomposition.bt_surgery_effect: BT surgery UNIVERSALLY increases cross-helical P_sol contribution (TG: 58%->100%, Imb: 48%->63%, Rnd: 53%->70%)
lamb_helicity_decomposition.claim3_strong_form: REFUTED for chiral/imbalanced flows under full NS (co-helical contributes 42-58%)
lamb_helicity_decomposition.claim3_achiral: EXACT at t=0 (machine epsilon). Drifts under full NS but stays 100% under BT surgery.
lamb_helicity_decomposition.helicity_bound_status: CORRECT when normalizations are consistent (66x was normalization bug, not formula error)
lamb_helicity_decomposition.data_files_verified: lamb_helicity_results.json DELETED (orphan, no generating script). lamb_decomposition_results.json is the verified output.
lamb_helicity_decomposition.status: OBSERVED (Numerical, S92 — verified by Meridian 2, full audit complete)

energy_weighted_leray_suppression.verdict: Energy weighting REDUCES alpha below geometric average. Near-antiparallel triads are energetically disfavored by the cascade. Geometric bound is CONSERVATIVE.

theoretical_kernel.beltrami_relation: Beltrami flows in ker(N_C). Nonlinear decoupling limit, NOT eigenstates of loop Hamiltonian.
theoretical_kernel.lyapunov_test: F(t) = ||P_sol(omega x v)||^2 / ||omega x v||^2 is NOT monotone. Full NS: F increases. BT surgery: F decreases on average.
theoretical_kernel.regulatory_constraint: Helicity conservation (Waleffe 1992) constrains heterochiral coupling budget.

path1_generalization.key_finding: R is geometry-specific; bridge width 1-2 degenerate
path1_generalization.result: POSITIVE — exact algebraic invariant family established

path2_random_sat.key_finding: No special behavior at alpha=4.267 (critical threshold)

path3_hodge_navier_stokes.key_finding: Valve = topological regularization; dual vertex-weakening / flow-strengthening
path3_hodge_navier_stokes.result: QUALITATIVE — analogy established, not quantitative bridge

proven_theorems: Thm 2.1: Grounded Laplacian as Schur Complement
Thm 3.1: Irreducibility of P_7 over Q
Thm 3.2: Irreducibility of P_5 over Q
Thm 8.2: Dual Effect of Valve Removal

leray_suppression_formula.exact_formula: alpha_{+-}(theta, rho) = 1 - (1+rho)^2(1+cos theta) / [(1+rho^2+2rho cos theta)(3-cos theta)]

properties.rho_minimum: isotropic avg MINIMIZED at rho=1 (1-ln2=0.307), INCREASES to 2(1-ln2)=0.614 as rho->0 or inf
properties.CORRECTION_S94: property (d) 'alpha->0 as rho->0 or inf' is FALSE. Scale separation WEAKENS suppression.

lamb_weighted_rho1.vanishing_at_extremes: F(theta) -> 0 at theta=0 AND theta=pi for ALL rho

open_problems.P1: Phase coherence control — multiple triads at same k3 can constructively interfere, pushing effective alpha_E above per-triad bound. THIS is the regularity problem.
open_problems.P2: C-S exponent — alpha<1 reduces constant but not 3/2 exponent in enstrophy bound
open_problems.P3: Extension of Migdal's No Explosion Theorem to deterministic ICs

miller_2024.ref: Miller, On the interaction of strain and vorticity (arXiv:2407.02691)
miller_2024.relevance: CRITICAL — proves global regularity for model equation with SAME enstrophy identity as NS. Gap between model and full NS = exactly our phase coherence question.

lei_ren_tian_2025.ref: Lei, Ren, Tian, Geometric characterization of potential NS singularities (arXiv:2501.08976)
lei_ren_tian_2025.relevance: HIGH — double-cone criterion on vorticity directions. May connect to our angular alpha formula.

manfredini_gurcan_2025.ref: Manfredini & Gürcan, Nonlinear phase synchronization in shell models (arXiv:2507.14142)
manfredini_gurcan_2025.relevance: HIGH — Kuramoto order parameter for triadic phase coherence. Direct tool for measuring P1 numerically.

migdal_v5_2024.ref: Migdal, Duality of NS to 1D system v5 (arXiv:2411.01389v5)
migdal_v5_2024.relevance: CONTEXT — No Explosion Theorem still stochastic only. Euler ensemble attractor universality open.

hou_2024.ref: Hou, Nearly self-similar blowup of generalized axisymmetric NS (arXiv:2405.10916v2)
hou_2024.relevance: CONTEXT — blowup at dim=3.188, not 3. Shows NS is near-critical; any constant reduction matters.

approach_d_something_different.d1_probabilistic_regularity: ASSESSED: 4 fundamental gaps identified. NPS framework insufficient without phase measure. Current limit reached.
approach_d_something_different.d2_hausdorff_dimension: ASSESSED: sin^2(theta)/4 improves CKN epsilon_0 by ~4x but NOT dimension (Lu-Doering sharp). q_CLT = 3/2 = gamma_critical universality discovered.
approach_d_something_different.d3_lean4_formalization: ASSESSED: 3-tier scope. Algebra (weeks), Calculus (months), Infrastructure (years). Not prioritized.

approach_f_helicity_chirality_bridge.f3_tao_necessity: PROVED: breaking helicity conservation enables blowup
approach_f_helicity_chirality_bridge.f6_interpolation: ASSESSED (M1d): eps_critical ~ C/Re -> 0. Scale gap 3/28 > 0 is a THEOREM. CLT alone cannot close gap.
approach_f_helicity_chirality_bridge.the_gap: sigma in (0,1). Three layers (geometric + topological + statistical) improve constants, not scaling. Dynamical input needed.

approach_a_phase_coherence.a1_kuramoto_dns: Measure Kuramoto R_K(k) in pseudospectral DNS — are triadic phases clustered or dispersed?
approach_a_phase_coherence.a2_manfredini_test: Test if full 3D triadic phases cluster near pi/2 (shell model optimum)
approach_a_phase_coherence.a3_sublinear_bound: Try: alpha_eff(k) <= alpha_per_triad * f(N_k) with f sub-linear
approach_a_phase_coherence.a4_cone_connection: Connect alpha<1/3 to Lei-Ren-Tian double-cone criterion

approach_b_structural_identity.b1_miller_deep_read: Understand what breaks between Miller's regular model and full NS
approach_b_structural_identity.b2_decomposition_script: Compute Miller's term + remainder in DNS, measure remainder
approach_b_structural_identity.b3_helicity_interpolation: Can sin^2(theta)/4 factor improve interpolation exponent for cross-helical part?

approach_c_migdal_extension.c1_identify_gap: Where exactly does Migdal's stochastic averaging fail for deterministic ICs?
approach_c_migdal_extension.c2_mollification: Approximate deterministic ICs by stochastic sequence, check if loop-space bounds are uniform
approach_c_migdal_extension.c3_bt_in_loop_space: Formalize BT-projected NS in Migdal's loop framework

approach_g_berry_frustration.berry_connection: A_lam = -cos(phi), F = sin(phi), Chern number = 2, flux = 4pi
approach_g_berry_frustration.g1_frustration_analysis: DONE (S100-M1). NEGATIVE for gap closure. Four theorems: T1 topological obstruction, T2 isotropic q>=3/2, T3 constant-sum trade-off, T4 crossover at delta~1/sqrt(k).
approach_g_berry_frustration.pencil_loophole: Vortex tubes circumvent Berry by concentrating in narrow angular cones. Total stretching delta-independent (constant-sum game).
approach_g_berry_frustration.three_level_refinement: kinematic (sin^2/4) -> topological (Berry q>=3/2 iso) -> dynamical (geometry = the gap)
approach_g_berry_frustration.anti_twist_synergy: OPEN. If delta >= k^(-1/2+eps), eps > 3/56, gap closes. Buaria anti-twist connection. Unproved.

fourier_physical_bridge.method: Phase scramble test: keep |u_hat(k)|, randomize phases, compare alpha and stretching

result_1_magnitude.interpretation: Actual alpha < scrambled alpha. Dynamics make Lamb MORE gradient-like.

result_2_tubes.finding: Vortex tubes are MORE suppressed than background
result_2_tubes.interpretation: Tubes concentrate gradient Lamb, not solenoidal.

result_3_stretching.interpretation: Random phases cannot produce positive omega.S.omega. Stretching REQUIRES NS-correlated phases.

fourier_physical_bridge.bridge_mechanism: Laser vs lightbulb: NS compresses solenoidal Lamb into smaller fraction but focuses it precisely on vorticity structure. Less total solenoidal forcing, but perfectly aligned for stretching.
fourier_physical_bridge.implication_for_regularity: Question shifts from 'how much Lamb survives Leray' (dynamics help) to 'can focused aligned residual drive S/D > 1 long enough for blowup'
fourier_physical_bridge.literature_connection: Servidio & Matthaeus 2008 (PRL) — depression of nonlinearity. Ohkitani & Kishiba 1995 — phases carry structure. Farge et al. 2001 — 3% phase-coherent coefficients carry all info.
